# BP-132 negative: the optimistic-lock UPDATE checks RowsAffected.
lang: go
file: BP-132-safe.go
variant: database-sql-version-update-checked
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
)

func updateUser(db *sql.DB, id, version int) error {
	// index-backed
	result, err := db.Exec("UPDATE users SET name = ?, version = version + 1 WHERE id = ? AND version = ?", "Ada", id, version)
	if err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("update: %w", err)
	}
	rows, err := result.RowsAffected()
	if err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("rows affected: %w", err)
	}
	if rows == 0 {
		return fmt.Errorf("stale user")
	}
	return nil
}
